name: wat321
description: Real-time Claude & Codex status bar widgets: session usage, weekly limits, and more

wat321.enableClaude.markdownDescription: Enable Claude usage and session token widgets. *Requires window reload to take effect.*

wat321.enableCodex.markdownDescription: Enable Codex usage and session token widgets. *Requires window reload to take effect.*

enumDescriptions: Full progress bars (10 blocks) with all details
Compact progress bars (5 blocks) with shortened token display
Minimal text-only view with no progress bars
wat321.displayMode.markdownDescription: Status bar display density. Changes apply immediately.

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run lint && tsc
scripts.package: npm run build && npx vsce package
